name: template_5
code:
local Players = game:GetService("Players")
local REBIRTH_STAT = "{{STAT}}"
local function setup(plr)
	local ls = plr:WaitForChild("leaderstats")
	local v = ls:FindFirstChild(REBIRTH_STAT) or Instance.new("IntValue")
	v.Name = REBIRTH_STAT
	v.Parent = ls
end
Players.PlayerAdded:Connect(function(p) task.defer(setup, p) end)
-- Hook rebirth: multiply income, reset level, etc.
